nasb.text: Then they will answer, ‘Because they forsook the covenant of the Lord their God and bowed down to other gods and served them.’ ”

esv.text: And they will answer, “Because they have forsaken the covenant of the Lord their God and worshiped other gods and served them.”’”

cnv.text: 必有人說：‘是因為他們離棄了耶和華他們　神的約，並且敬拜事奉別神。’”

ccb.text: 有人会回答，‘因为城里的人背弃了他们的上帝耶和华的约，供奉、祭拜其他神明。’”
